description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully as a baseline before making changes.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder to install all dependencies
Run npm run build to confirm the project builds without errors
Run npm run lint to verify no existing lint issues
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes or only has pre-existing warnings
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0 or only shows pre-existing issues
findings: Node.js 22.23.1 installed via mise (GPG verification disabled due to missing gpg-agent). npm install completed with 5 vulnerabilities (non-blocking). Build uses Turbopack. Middleware deprecation warning present (unrelated to our changes). Lint passes cleanly.
